title: Negative-Result Diagnostic: Why Threshold and Multiplicative Compounding Predictions Failed
summary: Interactive Jupyter notebook diagnosing why two JRN (Join Relevance Number) hypotheses failed: the inverted-U threshold prediction for aggregation sensitivity and the multiplicative compounding model for chain JRN. Computes 14 metric groups (M1–M14) across three dependency experiments (GBM probes, MLP probes, chain compounding) using 160 join-task pairs and chains. Mini demo data contains curated subsets from all three experiments with per-example inputs, outputs, and predictions.
